summary: Applied a surgical opening-paragraph rewrite to diversify Chapter 4's entry construction from Chapter 5 while preserving all original narrative facts, tone, and pressure cadence. No exit rewrite was required because the chapter already hands off to Chapter 5 through Kwon's overnight instructions and episode-two workflow.
edits: Reframed the opening from rain-arrival lead to production-board time-pressure lead at 8:11.
Retained original opening information (storm conditions, Han river sensory detail, hallway atmosphere, glasses smear, wrist-scar pain, and day schedule) in the revised paragraph.
Added a light callback to Chapter 3's dawn rundown to tighten previous-chapter entry continuity without changing causality.
